name: Banner
description: PROPOSED contract extracted from examples/astryx/.astryx-sandbox/node_modules/@astryxdesign/core/src/Banner/Banner.tsx (react-tsx adapter) — API surface only; anatomy, tokens, and design bindings await reconciliation and human review.

props.name: status
props.description: Status type controlling the icon and color scheme.

props.name: isDismissable
props.description:
Whether the banner can be dismissed.
When true, shows a close button and manages internal dismissed state
so the banner disappears even if `onDismiss` is not provided.

props.name: container
props.description:
Container type of the banner.
- `card`: standalone card with border-radius
- `section`: full-width section banner (no border-radius)

props.name: defaultIsExpanded
props.description:
Whether the content area (children) starts expanded.
Only relevant when children are provided.

events.name: dismiss
events.description:
Called when the dismiss button is clicked.
The banner will hide itself regardless of whether this callback is provided.
